deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Signature (the governance cell is a dregg:// sturdyref an auditor on another federation reacquires)

affordances.view_table: cap-only, Signature (a VIEWER reads the live route table + version)
affordances.register_service: cap-only, Either (a committee member publishes a service mount; the floor's register_service case freezes every governance slot — purely event-bearing)
affordances.commit_table_update: cap-only, None/root — CAP-AUTHORIZATION-ONLY (carries the existing commit decisive effect as its surface representative); see the seam note
affordances.propose_table_update: GATED (cap∧state), Either — no-pending precondition (pending_proposal_root==0); the fire submits the FULL propose turn, the executor re-enforcing Monotonic(pending_proposal_root) + frozen route_table_root/version
affordances.vote_on_proposal: GATED (cap∧state), Either — proposal-exists precondition (pending_proposal_root>=1); the fire submits the FULL vote turn, the executor re-enforcing Immutable(route_table_root, version, dispute_window_height)

deos.seam_gateable: CLOSED — the propose/vote fires run against the seeded governance cell carrying the full governance program (Cases), so a PENDING-root rewind (propose, Monotonic) and a frozen-slot violation (a vote that swaps route_table_root, Immutable) BITE in the deos fire path (tests/deos_seam.rs)
deos.seam_commit_witnessed_verifier: NAMED, NOT FAKED — commit_table_update rides Authorization::Custom + WitnessedPredicate{Custom{vk_hash: GOVERNANCE_VK}} (the constitutional threshold-sig). The EmbeddedExecutor wires WitnessedPredicateRegistry::default_builtins(), whose witnessed verifiers are the FAIL-CLOSED NotYetWiredVerifier — so a commit turn CANNOT have a happy-path green fire through the embedded executor today. commit_table_update is therefore exposed as a CAP-AUTHORIZATION-ONLY affordance: the deos seam asserts the cap gate clears for root (NOT 403) and does NOT assert a green executor commit. Full executor acceptance is gated on the WitnessedPredicateRegistry-into-executor lane.
